ohtani.title: Rockies bullpen comes through in Rockies win
ohtani.blurb: Rockies bullpen allows zero earned runs in the Rockies' 4-3 win over the Dodgers

imanaga.title: JJ Wetherholt's leadoff home run fuels Cardinals' win
imanaga.blurb: JJ Wetherholt's leadoff home run and Kyle Leahy's six strikeouts fuel Cardinals' 3-0 victory over the Cubs

suzuki.title: Cubs' four-RBI game leads to 5-2 victory over Orioles
suzuki.blurb: Dansby Swanson, Pete Crow-Armstrong, Alex Bregman, and Michael Busch record RBIs and Matthew Boyd pitches six scoreless innings in the Cubs' 5-2 win over the Orioles

yoshida.title: Contreras, Duran homer in Red Sox's 7-5 win
yoshida.blurb: Willson Contreras and Jarren Duran hit home runs to power the Red Sox to a 7-5 win over the Angels

okamoto.title: Jonatan Clase's homer leads Blue Jays' offense in win
okamoto.blurb: Jonatan Clase hits a three-run homer in the Blue Jays' 9-3 offensive win over the Giants

murakami.title: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in White Sox win
murakami.blurb: Miguel Vargas hits a walk-off homer in the 10th inning and Rikuu Nishida collects his first RBI in the White Sox 4-3 win over the Tigers

matsui.title: Craig Stammen recaps the Padres' 4-1 win
matsui.blurb: Craig Stammen discusses his pitching staff's performance tonight, talks Jake Cronenworth and more after a win over the D-backs
